market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.82%, Nasdaq +1.35%, Dow +0.48%. Commodities led sectors (+2.05%) while Industrials lagged (-1.67%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at -0.18%. 0 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +14.22%. Key headline: Wall Street is lower as a U.S.-Iran truce remains uncertain; Warsh faces confirmation hearing (COMP:IND:) - Seeking Alpha — headwind for risk assets.
